---
title: 'You know what I absolutely hate?'
date: '2022-05-19T00:53:00.0100000+00:00'
draft: false
categories: [data-nerd]
---

<b>It's wasting my time or yours. Check out my <a href="https://toposcreativeconsulting.blogspot.com/p/start-here.html" target="_blank">START HERE</a> page for details about this site.&nbsp;</b><div><b><br /></b><div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/fiverr-gig-cover-proofreading-editing-reporting-and-excel-1-a544b2503731.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="825" data-original-width="1465" height="180" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/fiverr-gig-cover-proofreading-editing-reporting-and-excel-1-39eaae549ff9.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/topos-logo-on-white-f0c69597b9e7.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="413" data-original-width="663" height="199" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/topos-logo-on-white-96ee2cd6b049.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/land-rates-e4c346530b98.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1006" data-original-width="1665" height="193" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/land-rates-157ea4f88737.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/reval-dashboard-0085a351cbc5.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="724" data-original-width="1268" height="183" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/reval-dashboard-ebe5d7ab3fc4.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/reval-pivot-and-datamodel-96d310e93c17.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="636" data-original-width="1303" height="156" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/reval-pivot-and-datamodel-15721abafc8b.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/automated-extraction-1-a42a46919c79.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="416" data-original-width="1283" height="104" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/automated-extraction-1-6c8b1e82c910.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/automated-extraction-2-f6cf7e28b545.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="682" data-original-width="966" height="226" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/automated-extraction-2-51ff6d2416f9.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/permits-78b53bea8e39.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="131" data-original-width="1503" height="28" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/permits-9f14de5b3c64.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/fiverr-gig-cover-reporting-and-excel-2-5c8ebfcc5fdd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="843" data-original-width="1495" height="180" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/fiverr-gig-cover-reporting-and-excel-2-ae057074e291.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/fiverr-gig-cover-proofreading-editing-3-e5c8ac7e5bee.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="839" data-original-width="1491" height="180" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/fiverr-gig-cover-proofreading-editing-3-6a67e332b163.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div></div>
